title: Castra Licensee Pty Ltd — Systemic failures
investigation_objective: AUSTRAC issued infringement notices in September 2024 to a batch of 16 businesses, including Castra Licensee Pty Ltd, for failing to lodge their 2023 annual AML/CTF compliance reports. Castra did not pay its notice, and AUSTRAC escalated to Federal Court civil penalty proceedings; on 26 May 2026 Justice Lee ordered Castra to pay a $50,000 pecuniary penalty plus $15,000 costs.
scope: Failed to lodge a mandatory annual AML/CTF compliance report; Did not pay an AUSTRAC infringement notice, resulting in escalation to Federal Court civil penalty proceedings; Ordered by the Federal Court to pay a $50,000 penalty plus $15,000 costs (26 May 2026)
